title: Google AI Studio 2.0 - NEW Powerful Autonomous AI Coding Agent Can Build ANYTHING & IS FULLY FREE!
description:
In this video, we dive into the brand new updates to Google AI Studio — now featuring a powerful autonomous coding agent that can build full-stack applications from a single prompt… completely FREE.
